name: io.github.davidmosiah/strava-mcp
description: Privacy-first, unofficial Strava MCP server for AI training, route, activity stream and performance agents.

environmentVariables.name: STRAVA_CLIENT_ID
environmentVariables.description: Strava OAuth client ID. Optional when configured with strava-mcp-server setup.

environmentVariables.name: STRAVA_CLIENT_SECRET
environmentVariables.description: Strava OAuth client secret. Prefer strava-mcp-server setup so this secret is stored in ~/.strava-mcp/config.json instead of MCP client config.

environmentVariables.name: STRAVA_REDIRECT_URI
environmentVariables.description: Redirect URI configured in the Strava Developer Dashboard. Optional when configured with strava-mcp-server setup.

environmentVariables.name: STRAVA_TOKEN_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Optional local path for OAuth tokens. Defaults to ~/.strava-mcp/tokens.json.

environmentVariables.name: STRAVA_PRIVACY_MODE
environmentVariables.description: Optional payload mode: summary, structured, or raw. Defaults to structured. raw means full Strava API payloads, not continuous 24/7 raw sensor telemetry.

environmentVariables.name: STRAVA_CACHE
environmentVariables.description: Optional SQLite cache toggle. Set to true or sqlite to enable.

environmentVariables.name: STRAVA_CACHE_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Optional local SQLite cache path. Defaults to ~/.strava-mcp/cache.sqlite.
